Name: Chord Energy Corp
Description: Chord Energy Corp is a prominent independent oil and natural gas producer with a strategic focus on the Bakken formation in North Dakota. The company aims to maximize shareholder value through disciplined capital allocation and robust cash flow generation while managing a diverse asset portfolio responsive to fluctuating commodity markets. Committed to sustainability, Chord Energy employs advanced technologies in its exploration and production activities, which enhance operational efficiency and performance. As the energy sector evolves, Chord Energy is well-positioned to leverage its innovative practices and strategic adaptability, driving long-term growth and maintaining a competitive advantage.
Address: 1001 FANNIN STREET, HOUSTON, TX, UNITED STATES, 77002
